genre_chain.base_work_author: محمد بن عبد الله بن النجار الفتوحي الحنبلي

author_identification.canonical_name_ar: محمد بن عبد الله بن النجار الفتوحي الحنبلي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent Hanbali jurist and author of several important works in Islamic jurisprudence.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: This work is a significant contribution to Hanbali fiqh, combining and summarizing key texts.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Widely studied and referenced in Hanbali legal education.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: عبد الله بن عبد المحسن التركي is a respected scholar and editor known for his meticulous work on classical Islamic texts.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The edition appears to be based on a critical review of available manuscripts and includes annotations for clarity.
